overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a drive through a futuristic city highway system. The player drives from covered underpasses through open highway with city views and into industrial zones with factories and smokestacks during golden hour sunset.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered highway underpass with concrete elevated structures

agents.ego_description: driving steadily through covered highway section beneath elevated roadways

notable_agents.action: red sedan driving ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass spanning across the road
metal guardrail running along the right side of the highway
curved elevated highway ramp structure visible through the windshield

segments.scene_description: Driving through a covered highway section beneath massive concrete overpasses and elevated road structures. The road is multi-lane asphalt with metal guardrails, and sparse traffic is visible ahead in the shadows of the overpasses.

scene_state.functional_zone: open multi-lane highway approaching urban center

events.description: exits covered underpass into open highway with clear view of city skyline
direct golden hour sunlight illuminates the scene as the vehicle leaves the shadow of overpasses

agents.ego_description: accelerating on open highway while navigating through moderate traffic flow

notable_agents.action: white sports car overtaking on the right side

entered.detail: cluster of futuristic skyscrapers visible on the horizon
large commercial billboard with colorful advertising displays
contemporary glass and steel high-rise building alongside the highway

segments.scene_description: The vehicle emerges from the covered section into open highway bathed in warm golden hour sunlight. The futuristic city skyline becomes visible in the distance, and commercial billboards line the roadside as traffic density increases with vehicles overtaking.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial highway zone with factories and smokestacks

events.description: entering industrial district with large factory buildings and smokestacks replacing commercial skyline

agents.ego_description: maintaining highway speed through industrial zone, weaving between other vehicles

notable_agents.action: yellow van traveling in the left lane parallel to ego vehicle

entered.detail: large industrial facility with multiple buildings and tall smokestacks
tall industrial chimney emitting smoke into the sky
large cylindrical industrial storage tank with metal exterior
elevated metal pipes running parallel to the highway

segments.scene_description: The highway transitions into an industrial zone dominated by large factory complexes with smokestacks and storage tanks. The architecture shifts from commercial glass towers to industrial concrete and metal structures with visible piping infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial commercial highway with warehouses and billboards

events.description: passing under overhead highway sign gantry structure

agents.ego_description: continuing drive through industrial area, maintaining steady highway speed

notable_agents.action: dark colored sedan driving ahead in the distance

entered.detail: large billboard with prominent red and blue GIRUS advertisement
metal truss structure spanning the highway with directional signs
large warehouse building with corrugated metal exterior walls

segments.scene_description: Continuing through the industrial highway section with large commercial billboards including a prominent GIRUS advertisement. The vehicle passes under overhead sign gantries while industrial warehouses line the roadside, and traffic becomes sparser.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive that transitions from the oppressive shadows of concrete overpasses into a sun-drenched highway and finally into a sprawling industrial zone. It begins beneath massive elevated road structures and metal guardrails, moving through a dim, covered section of the multi-lane asphalt. As the vehicle emerges from the shadows, the scene opens into a wide highway bathed in warm golden hour sunlight, revealing a distant futuristic skyline and bright commercial billboards. The environment then shifts from glass towers to a landscape of industrial concrete and metal, characterized by large factory complexes, smokestacks, and intricate piping infrastructure. Finally, the camera passes under overhead sign gantries and a prominent GIRUS advertisement, gliding past industrial warehouses as the traffic thins out.
